summary: Implemented design system: installed Pretendard font, defined CSS custom properties in :root and @theme (--color-primary: #6366F1, --color-accent: #F59E0B, --color-bg: #F8FAFC, etc.), replaced all static inline styles across EventCard, LandingPage, DetailPage, CreatePage, NavBar, CountdownBlock, LoadingSpinner with Tailwind classes using design tokens. Cards use rounded-2xl, buttons use rounded-xl. Only dynamic user-chosen accent colors retain inline styles. Build passes with 0 errors.
